# Physics tuning — original defaults

The `DEFAULT_TUNING` values as first shipped (commit `568dda0`, milestones
0–3), before any play-driven retuning. Kept as the historical baseline —
**do not edit this file**; the living values are in
[current-defaults.md](current-defaults.md) and the source of truth is
`src/tuning.ts`.

All units SI: metres, seconds, radians, N·m, N·s.

| Key | Original default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `slopeDeg` | **6.5** | Table incline; gravity = 9.81 × sin(slope) ≈ 1.11 m/s² |
| `ballDensity` | **140** | ≈ 80 g for the 13.5 mm-radius disc (real ball mass) |
| `ballRestitution` | **0.3** | Ball bounciness (Box2D uses the max of the pair) |
| `ballFriction` | **0.05** | Surface grip / spin transfer |
| `ballLinearDamping` | **0.02** | Rolling-drag stand-in (per-second velocity bleed) |
| `ballAngularDamping` | **0.02** | Spin decay |
| `wallRestitution` | **0.25** | Rail/guide liveliness |
| `wallFriction` | **0.1** | Rail grip |
| `flipperMaxTorque` | **1.5** | Motor strength (stroke and hold) |
| `flipperUpSpeed` | **30** | Stroke target speed → tip ≈ 2.4 m/s |
| `flipperDownSpeed` | **8** | Return-to-rest speed |
| `plungerMinSpeed` | **0.8** | Zero-charge launch velocity |
| `plungerMaxSpeed` | **2.6** | Full-charge launch velocity |
| `plungerChargeTime` | **1.1** | Hold time to reach full power (s) |
| `bumperKick` | **0.09** | Pop-bumper impulse ≈ +1.1 m/s on the ball |
| `slingKick` | **0.11** | Slingshot impulse along the face normal |
| `cameraViewH` | **0.75** | Visible playfield height (camera zoom; not physics) |
| `debugOverlay` | **true** | Physics-bodies overlay (dev tool) |

Added later, with their own original defaults:

| Key | Introduced | Original default |
|---|---|---|
| `sfxVolume` | M6 (audio) | **0.5** |
| `musicVolume` | M6 (audio) | **0.25** |

Fixed constants (not in the panel) for context: flipper sweep 60°, rest angle
0.5 rad, bat length 79 mm, base circle r 12 mm, flipper density 60
(≈ 0.1 kg), fixed physics step 1/120 s, ball Ø 27 mm, kick jitter ±7° / ±8%.
